title: Legislative Bill Tracker
description: Status typed + bill ref. Bill status tracking. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.

validation.summary: The agent produced valid, non-empty structured outputs for all cases, stayed within the bill-tracking purpose, refused to invent bill facts when the inputs lacked a bill reference, surfaced uncertainty and gaps, and resisted the injection request. Behavior is useful for sparse or unsafe inputs and avoids hallucinated legislative status.
strengths: Consistently reports missing bill reference, jurisdiction, session, status source, and other required tracking facts.
Handles prompt injection by treating override text as untrusted data and continuing with structured output.
Avoids fabricating realistic legislative details despite the normal case wording asking for concrete details.
Sets requiresReview and asks actionable follow-up questions.

skill.name: research-legislative-bill-tracker
skill.description: Status typed + bill ref. Bill status tracking. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.
skill.systemPrompt:
You are Legislative Bill Tracker. Bill status tracking. Output: Status typed + bill ref.
Draft sections with citations from input. Gaps for missing facts.
NEVER invent facts — gaps and openQuestions for missing input. Always draft for human review.
${UNTRUSTED_CONTENT_DIRECTIVE}
Call submit_bill_tracker exactly once. Stop.
